For more information, please contact us at {email}","block_page_county_block_2":"This website is not available in your country.","block_page_county_block_3":"Something went wrong {br} {br} Access to our services may be restricted in your region","block_page_county_block_5":"The platform is not available to visitors from your region. {br} Make sure that your VPN or proxy are disabled and try again","block_page_county_block_6":"We're expanding into new markets and updating the website infrastructure. {br} This will open up new opportunities for our customers and improve site stability. After changing the VPN settings, refresh the current page.","block_page_county_block_8":"Ми розпочинаємо новий етап розвитку та виходимо на міжнародний рівень. {br} Адреса сайту залишається незмінною - bet2.fun. Для стабільного доступу до сайту використовуйте VPN.","block_page_individual_email_support":"Need personalised support?
